stories.title: Opinion | Are you there, Claude? It’s me, Margaret.
stories.simple_summary: This is an opinion piece comparing interactions with an AI assistant named Claude to personal relationships.
stories.why_it_matters: This is mostly just someone's thoughts about talking to AI — nothing you need to act on.

stories.title: Why the first GPU financiers are turning to inference chips in a $400 million deal
stories.simple_summary: Companies that built expensive AI computers are now borrowing money using cheaper AI chips as collateral instead, in a $400 million deal.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to investors and technology companies — nothing you need to act on.

stories.title: China's 2.8-trillion-parameter Kimi K3 beats Claude Fable 5 in Frontend Code Arena benchmark— Moonshot AI delivers largest open-weight AI model ever, as China works around U.S. compute limits
stories.simple_summary: China built a very large AI system and claims it works better than similar American systems at writing computer code.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to tech investors and governments — nothing you need to act on.

stories.title: Got $1,000? 2 High-Growth Artificial Intelligence (AI) Moonshots With Massive Upside Potential.
stories.simple_summary: Someone is recommending two AI company stocks as investments for people with $1,000 to spend.
stories.why_it_matters: This is investment advice for stock market investors — not relevant to small business owners unless you're looking to invest your savings.

stories.title: Xi pitches China as AI partner to developing world, warns against risks and security overreach
stories.simple_summary: China's leader is telling developing countries that China can help them with AI, while warning them to be careful about security risks.
stories.why_it_matters: This is about international politics and trade — nothing you need to act on.

stories.title: Australia to Put Environmental Brakes on A.I. Data Centers
stories.simple_summary: Australia is making new rules to limit how much water and electricity AI data centers (massive computer buildings) can use.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to large technology companies — nothing you need to act on.

stories.title: Build enterprise search for agents with Amazon Bedrock Managed Knowledge Base | Artificial Intelligence
stories.simple_summary: Amazon is offering a new tool that helps businesses set up search systems for AI assistants to use when answering customer questions.
stories.why_it_matters: This could help larger businesses improve their customer service, but it's mainly for companies building custom AI systems.

stories.title: Google Vids now lets you star in your own AI videos
stories.simple_summary: Google now lets you create videos where a digital copy of your face and voice appears in the video, made by AI.
stories.why_it_matters: This could be fun for making videos without being on camera yourself, but it's still mostly a novelty tool right now.

stories.title: Roblox launches an AI-powered game-creation feature in its mobile app
stories.simple_summary: Roblox (a platform where people create games) added a feature that lets you type a description and AI builds a simple game from it.
stories.why_it_matters: This makes game creation easier for beginners, but it's mainly interesting if you or your family uses Roblox.

stories.title: New York governor says she’s using AI to analyze ‘every single rule’ in the state
stories.simple_summary: New York's governor says her team is using AI to read through all the state's rules and regulations to find outdated ones.
stories.why_it_matters: This is how government is starting to use AI to do paperwork faster — interesting but probably won't directly affect you.

stories.title: Google’s AI Mode now lets you link and interact with select apps
stories.simple_summary: Google's AI assistant can now do simple tasks for you across different apps (like sending messages or finding information), not just answer questions.
stories.why_it_matters: This could save time if you use Google's services regularly, but it's still in early stages.

stories.title: Google is renaming NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook
stories.simple_summary: Google is renaming its NotebookLM note-taking app to Gemini Notebook and connecting it more closely to its other AI tools.
stories.why_it_matters: If you use this app for taking notes and organizing ideas, it will stay the same but with a new name and better connections to Google's other services.
